title: crataegus chrysocarpa var. rotundifolia
intro: Crataegus chrysocarpa var. rotundifolia, also known as the Roundleaf Hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The medicinal properties of Crataegus chrysocarpa var. rotundifolia are attributed to its berries, leaves, and bark, which contain flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits associated with this plant include cardiovascular support, anti-inflammatory properties, and antioxidant effects, which can help to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of Crataegus chrysocarpa var. rotundifolia include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support heart health and overall well-being.
